title: Verify whether reference/ is reliably loaded in skill activation path

H-ref.description: Variant B (spec-only, no reference/ content) accuracy < Variant A (full Implementation) accuracy - 10pp
H-ref.rationale: Claude Code skill activation injects only SKILL.md content; reference/ directory files are not automatically loaded into context. Without the Step 4 criteria, the model must reason from the sparse spec alone, which Exp-D showed degrades accuracy by ~20pp.

H-load.description: Variant B accuracy >= Variant A accuracy - 5pp (reference/ effectively loaded)
H-load.rationale: Exp-D showed P-spec (spec-only) vs P-full (full content) gap was ~20pp, strongly suggesting reference/ would not be auto-loaded.

variants: variant-b (≤40 lines spec-only, no reference/ in context)
